SEARCH

Uses of Interface
com.nib.commons.storage.IDataArea

Packages that use IDataArea
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.esql
API classes for Embedded SQL (E/SQL) integration and runtime support.
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.scripting
NIB scripting framework.
com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort
SORT
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.jms
Java Message Service (JMS) integration for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.jms.api
Supernaut JMS API
com.nib.supernaut.tcp
TCP/IP socket communication support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.values
Value objects and constants for Supernaut.
com.nib.utilities.api.le
Language Environment (LE) API utilities.

  • Uses of IDataArea in com.nib.commons.esql

    Classes in com.nib.commons.esql that implement IDataArea
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Sqlca
    Sqlca class extends NGroup and provides a structure for SQL communication area.

  • Uses of IDataArea in com.nib.commons.storage

    Classes in com.nib.commons.storage that implement IDataArea
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractNDecimal
    AbstractNDecimal is an abstract class designed to handle numeric values with a specified number of significant digits and adjustable decimal precision.
    class 
    AbstractNElementary
    AbstractNElementary represents an abstract definition for an elementary field within a memory structure.
    class 
    AbstractNField
    Represents an abstract class for managing and manipulating memory fields.
    class 
    AbstractNFloatingPoint
    AbstractNFloatingPoint is an abstract class representing a floating-point numeric data type.
    class 
    AbstractNNumeric
    Represents an abstract representation of a numeric field.
    class 
    NBinary
    NBinary is a subclass of AbstractNElementary and represents a binary field in memory with specific behavior and customizations.
    class 
    NChar
    Represents a character-based data structure that provides functionality for handling string, byte, and character values.
    class 
    NCharBin
    The NCharBin class extends the functionality of the NChar class.
    class 
    NCharInspected
    The NCharInspected class extends the NChar class by providing additional functionality to inspect and replace characters or substrings within the character sequence.
    class 
    NDouble
    NDouble is a concrete implementation of the AbstractNFloatingPoint class, representing a double-precision floating-point numeric data type.
    class 
    NFloat
    The NFloat class represents a single-precision floating-point numeric type.
    class 
    NGroup
    The NGroup class is a representation of a storage group that allows for hierarchical data organization and manipulation.
    class 
    NInt16
    Represents a signed 16-bit integer (2-byte) data type.
    class 
    NInt32
    Represents a 32-bit signed integer within the numeric data types hierarchy.
    class 
    NInt64
    The NInt64 class represents a 64-bit signed integer data type.
    class 
    NInteger
    The NInteger class provides an implementation for handling numeric integer variables.
    class 
    NPacked
    The NPacked class represents a packed decimal data type typically used in memory-based numerical operations.
    class 
    NPointer
    Persistent pointer to a memory location.
    class 
    NUInt16
    The NUInt16 class represents an unsigned 16-bit integer.
    class 
    NUInt32
    The NUInt32 class represents a 32-bit unsigned integer in a specific data area structure.
    class 
    NVarcharField
    The NVarcharField class is a data field representation that supports variable-length string values, with options to define and manage the maximum length of characters.
    class 
    NZoned
    Represents a numeric, zoned-decimal formatted field with support for variable length, decimal places, and optional signed values.
    class 
    SpecialRegister
    The SpecialRegister class is a specialized extension of the NChar class used for creating and managing special register instances with predefined initial values.

    Memory.contains(IDataArea a)
    Checks if the memory contains a specified data area.

    Redefines the current field using the provided data area.

    Redefines the current floating-point field using the specified data area.
